scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/remind-blocks-jdk21} ANDROID_HOME=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Android/Sdk} PATH=${JAVA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/remind-blocks-jdk21}/bin:$PATH ./gradlew assembleDebug
